recent_excerpts: The EPSS v3 model reduces false positive rates by 40% for defenders prioritizing the 28,000+ CVEs published annually, according to analysis by the SANS Internet Storm Center.
NIST will no longer analyze all 263,000+ annual CVE submissions, shifting to a risk-based model to prioritize high-impact flaws as submissions surge 263% since 2020.
